segments.text: And it came to pass, when Jesus had finished all these sayings,
he said unto his disciples:
Then assembled together the chief priests, and the scribes, and the elders of the people, unto the palace of the high priest, who was called Caiaphas
And consulted that they might take Jesus by subtilty, and kill him.
Not on the feast day, lest there be an uproar among the people.
segments.speaker: Chief Priests

segments.text: Now when Jesus was in Bethany, in the house of Simon the leper
But when his disciples saw it, they had indignation
To what purpose is this waste?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: For this ointment might have been sold for much, and given to the poor.
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: When Jesus understood it,
he said unto them:
Then one of the twelve, called Judas Iscariot, went unto the chief priests
What will ye give me, and I will deliver him unto you?
segments.speaker: Judas

segments.text: And they covenanted with him for thirty pieces of silver.
Where wilt thou that we prepare for thee to eat the passover?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Lord, is it I?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Master, is it I?
segments.speaker: Judas

segments.text: You have said.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And when they had sung an hymn, they went out into the mount of Olives.
Though all men shall be offended because of thee, yet will I never be offended.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Though I should die with thee, yet will I not deny thee.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Likewise also said all the disciples.
O my Father, if it be possible, let this cup pass from me: nevertheless not as I will, but as thou wilt.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And while he yet spake, lo, Judas, one of the twelve, came, and with him a great multitude with swords and staves, from the chief priests and elders of the people.
Hail, master;
segments.speaker: Judas

segments.text: and kissed him.
Thou also wast with Jesus of Galilee.
segments.speaker: Servant Girl

segments.text: I know not what thou sayest.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: I know not the man.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: And immediately the cock crew.
And Peter remembered the word of Jesus, which said unto him, Before the cock crow, thou shalt deny me thrice. And he went out, and wept bitterly.
